productDisplayName: Baggit Women Beige Goofy Jhuti Wallet
description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This two-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Product DetailsCrafted from jute with a leatherette flapTri fold wallet with ten card holder slots, one id slot, three pockets and a zippered pocket on one side, a buttoned pocket and two pockets on the centre fold A zippered pocket on the backMaterial and CareLeatherette, juteWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeLength: 12 cmsWidth: 22 cms
